UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 11
Judge Pro Tem: Michael Lee, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Georgetta Lovett.
Attorney Michael Rossoff for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kathleen Gray is present.
Attorney Hilda Chan appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem , litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of July 27, 2015 is vacated. (501/jpt)
